scripts.build:pages: GITHUB_PAGES=true vite build && cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && mkdir -p dist/codex dist/founder dist/tutorial && cp dist/index.html dist/codex/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/founder/index.html && for page in 1-codex-intro 2-desktop-setup 3-agents-context 4-cli-terminal 5-cloud-github 6-sandbox-permissions 7-skills-mcp-plugins 8-agents-skills 9-real-workflows 10-automation 11-security-governance 12-cheatsheets-faq; do cp dist/index.html dist/tutorial/$page.html; done
